description: A customer wants to remove the 'Premium Voicemail' feature from their plan to save money.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and verify they have the 'Premium Voicemail' add-on.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the feature is active on the customer's account.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer of the monthly savings and confirm they wish to proceed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly states the new, lower monthly cost.

nodes.task_description: Remove the add-on from the customer's plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully removes the feature using the system tool.
